We need more chilli sauce makers AND heat eaters to join the fun!
We're looking for the most exciting and flavourful chilli sauce or Oil in the Hunter, not just the spiciest!

We went to @theoak.tigheshill for some Hot & Spicy inspo! These bloody Mary's gave the perfect kick! Go try one for yourself and maybe plan your chilli sauce recipe while you're at it!
